channel.title: Test News Feed
channel.description: Test news feed for unit tests

item.title: Scientists discover breakthrough cancer treatment
item.description: Researchers announce a major breakthrough in cancer treatment.

item.title: Community volunteers restore local park
item.description: Hundreds of volunteers gathered to restore the city park.

item.title: Teen wins international robotics competition
item.description: A 16-year-old wins first place at the global robotics championship.
